description.en: A common black waterbird with a distinctive white 'shield' on its forehead and bizarre, lobed feet instead of webbed ones.
description.zh: 一种常见的黑色水鸟，前额有一块独特的白色“额板”，脚上长着奇特的瓣蹼而不是全蹼。

anatomy.en: Though often confused with ducks due to their similar habitat, coots are actually in the rail family. The Eurasian coot has soot-black, velvety plumage, contrasted sharply by a striking white beak and a rigid, white fleshy plate on its forehead known as a 'frontal shield'. Instead of webbed feet like a duck, it has enormous, greyish-green toes flanked by scalloped flaps of skin (lobes) that spread out to swim and fold back when lifting the foot.
anatomy.zh: 虽然常因栖息地相似而被误认为鸭子，但骨顶鸡实际上属于秧鸡科的成员。骨顶鸡拥有深色如天鹅绒般的黑色羽毛，与其醒目的白色嘴喙和前额上称为「额板」的坚硬白色肉质板形成强烈的鲜明对比。与鸭子的全脚蹼不同，它长着巨大的灰绿色脚趾，脚趾两侧边缘有扇贝形的皮褶（瓣蹼），游泳时会展开，抬脚时会向后折叠。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Coots are incredibly territorial and aggressive during the breeding season. Rival males will swim towards each other with wings raised in a threatening posture and engage in furious, splashing fights where they sit back on the water and slash at each other using their large, clawed lobed feet. They are excellent divers, frequently plunging underwater to rip up pieces of aquatic vegetation, insects, and small fish.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 在繁殖季节，骨顶鸡具有令人难以置信的领地意识和攻击性。敌对的雄鸡会扬起翅膀、摆出威胁的姿态游向对方，然后开始一场激烈的水花四溅的打斗：它们会往水面后仰，用巨大且带爪子的瓣蹼互相猛烈踢击。它们是出色的潜水员，经常潜入水下撕扯下水生植被的碎片、昆虫和小鱼带出水面进食。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are highly adaptable and very common across Eurasia and Africa, found anywhere from urban park ponds and large natural lakes to slow-moving rivers and coastal lagoons. In northern, colder parts of their range, they are migratory, flocking together in massive 'rafts' of thousands of birds to head south before lakes freeze over.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们的适应性极强，在整个欧亚大陆和非洲非常常见，在城市公园的池塘、大型天然湖泊、流速缓慢的河流甚至海岸泻湖随处可见。在它们分布区域较寒冷的北部，它们是候鸟，在湖泊结冰前，成千上万只骨顶鸡会聚集在一起形成巨大的鸟群「筏子」并向南方迁徙。
